allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add card badge checkbox progress separator accordion -y)

Bash(node -e " const REST_API_KEY = 'f4593ad9b1b97d3a20724893e6e82390'; const areas = [ {name:'서울 강남', lat:37.5012, lng:127.0396}, {name:'서울 송파', lat:37.5133, lng:127.1001}, {name:'서울 마포', lat:37.5583, lng:126.9368}, {name:'서울 강서', lat:37.5509, lng:126.8495}, {name:'서울 노원', lat:37.6543, lng:127.0568}, {name:'서울 성북', lat:37.5894, lng:127.0167}, {name:'서울 영등포', lat:37.5264, lng:126.8963}, {name:'서울 관악', lat:37.4784, lng:126.9516}, {name:'서울 동작', lat:37.5124, lng:126.9393}, {name:'서울 용산', lat:37.5326, lng:126.9906}, ]; const keywords = ['포장이사','이삿짐센터','이사업체','용달이사']; async function search\(q,lat,lng,page=1\) { const url = 'https://dapi.kakao.com/v2/local/search/keyword.json?query='+encodeURIComponent\(q\)+'&y='+lat+'&x='+lng+'&radius=15000&size=15&page='+page; const r = await fetch\(url, {headers:{Authorization:'KakaoAK '+REST_API_KEY}}\); if\(!r.ok\) return []; const d = await r.json\(\); return d.documents||[]; } async function main\(\) { const all = new Map\(\); let id = 9000; for\(const kw of keywords\) { for\(const area of areas\) { for\(let p=1;p<=3;p++\) { const results = await search\(area.name+' '+kw, area.lat, area.lng, p\); if\(!results.length\) break; for\(const doc of results\) { const key = doc.place_name+'_'+doc.address_name; if\(all.has\(key\)||!doc.phone\) continue; all.set\(key, {id:'sm-'+\(id++\), name:doc.place_name, lat:parseFloat\(doc.y\), lng:parseFloat\(doc.x\), addr:doc.road_address_name||doc.address_name, phone:doc.phone}\); } await new Promise\(r=>setTimeout\(r,100\)\); } } } const entries = [...all.values\(\)]; for\(const p of entries\) { const rating = \(4.3+Math.random\(\)*0.7\).toFixed\(1\); const reviews = Math.floor\(Math.random\(\)*300\)+5; console.log\(' p\(\\"'+p.id+'\\",\\"'+p.name.replace\(/\\"/g,\\"'\\"\)+'\\",\\"moving\\",\\"포장이사\\",'+rating+','+reviews+',\\"경력 '+\(Math.floor\(Math.random\(\)*12\)+3\)+'년\\",0,\\"가격문의\\",[\\"서울\\"],[\\"전화문의\\"],true,'+p.lat+','+p.lng+',\\"'+p.addr.replace\(/\\"/g,\\"'\\"\)+'\\",\\"'+p.phone+'\\"\),'\); } console.error\('서울 포장이사 추가: '+entries.length+'개'\); } main\(\); ")
